case_title: CHAIKIN, DOUGLAS A. VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY CHAIKIN, DOUGLAS A. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAIKIN, DOUGLAS A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $526.00, THE CLAIM IS AMENDED TO REFLECT THE PROPER DEFT: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO TRACY DOUGHTY OFFICE OF CITY ATTORNEY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RETURNED SIGNED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-01-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-06-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
